name: Power Manager Simulator
info:
# Power Manager Simulator

This flow provides a dashboard for testing the Power Manager
decision engine without Home Assistant.

## Usage
1. Select a scenario or adjust inputs manually
2. Click "Run Decision" to execute the engine
3. View results in the Results panel

## Requirements
- node-red-dashboard
- Power Manager logic modules (../src/logic/)

## Fixtures
Scenarios are loaded from test/fixtures/*.json

name: Scenario Select
label: Load Scenario
tooltip: Select a test scenario to load

name: Load Fixture
func:
// Load fixture from file or use defaults
const fixtures = {
    'winter-offpeak-ev': {
        timestamp: '2024-01-15T02:30:00Z',
        inputs: {
            p1_power: 0.5,
            pv_power: 0,
            boiler_switch: 'off',
            boiler_power: 2400,
            boiler_force: 'off',
            pool_season: 'off',
            pool_power: 0,
            ev_state: 129,
            ev_switch: 'off',
            ev_power: 0,
            ev_limit: 6,
            heater_right_switch: 'off',
            heater_table_switch: 'off',
            ac_living_state: 'off',
            ac_mancave_state: 'off',
            ac_office_state: 'off',
            ac_bedroom_state: 'off',
            temp_living: 20,
            temp_bedroom: 20,
            temp_mancave: 18,
            ovr_ac_living: 'Auto',
            ovr_ac_bedroom: 'Auto',
            ovr_ac_office: 'Auto',
            ovr_ac_mancave: 'Auto',
            ovr_pool: 'Auto',
            ovr_boiler: 'Auto',
            ovr_ev: 'Auto'
        }
    },
    'summer-export-cool': {
        timestamp: '2024-07-15T14:00:00Z',
        inputs: {
            p1_power: -2.0,
            pv_power: 5000,
            boiler_switch: 'off',
            boiler_power: 0,
            boiler_force: 'off',
            pool_season: 'on',
            pool_power: 1800,
            ev_state: 128,
            ev_switch: 'off',
            ev_power: 0,
            ev_limit: 16,
            heater_right_switch: 'off',
            heater_table_switch: 'off',
            ac_living_state: 'off',
            ac_mancave_state: 'off',
            ac_office_state: 'off',
            ac_bedroom_state: 'off',
            temp_living: 27,
            temp_bedroom: 25,
            temp_mancave: 24,
            ovr_ac_living: 'Auto',
            ovr_ac_bedroom: 'Auto',
            ovr_ac_office: 'Auto',
            ovr_ac_mancave: 'Auto',
            ovr_pool: 'Auto',
            ovr_boiler: 'Auto',
            ovr_ev: 'Auto'
        }
    },
    'sensor-unavailable': {
        timestamp: '2024-01-15T12:00:00Z',
        inputs: {
            p1_power: 'unavailable',
            pv_power: 'unknown',
            boiler_switch: 'off',
            boiler_power: 0,
            pool_season: 'off',
            ev_state: 128,
            ovr_ac_living: 'Auto'
        }
    },
    'custom': {
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
        inputs: {
            p1_power: 1.0,
            pv_power: 0,
            pool_season: 'off',
            ev_state: 128
        }
    }
};

const fixture = fixtures[msg.payload] || fixtures['custom'];
flow.set('simulator_inputs', fixture.inputs);
flow.set('simulator_timestamp', fixture.timestamp);

// Send to UI update
msg.payload = fixture;
return msg;

name: Update UI
Run Decision
label: Run Decision Engine
tooltip: Execute decision engine with current inputs

name: Collect Inputs
func:
// Collect all inputs from flow context
const stored = flow.get('simulator_inputs') || {};

// Merge with any direct UI inputs
const inputs = {
    p1_power: flow.get('ui_p1_power') ?? stored.p1_power ?? 1.0,
    pv_power: flow.get('ui_pv_power') ?? stored.pv_power ?? 0,
    boiler_switch: stored.boiler_switch ?? 'off',
    boiler_power: stored.boiler_power ?? 0,
    boiler_force: stored.boiler_force ?? 'off',
    pool_season: flow.get('ui_pool_season') ?? stored.pool_season ?? 'off',
    pool_power: stored.pool_power ?? 0,
    pool_climate: stored.pool_climate ?? 'off',
    ev_state: flow.get('ui_ev_state') ?? stored.ev_state ?? 128,
    ev_switch: stored.ev_switch ?? 'off',
    ev_power: stored.ev_power ?? 0,
    ev_limit: stored.ev_limit ?? 6,
    heater_right_switch: stored.heater_right_switch ?? 'off',
    heater_table_switch: stored.heater_table_switch ?? 'off',
    ac_living_state: stored.ac_living_state ?? 'off',
    ac_mancave_state: stored.ac_mancave_state ?? 'off',
    ac_office_state: stored.ac_office_state ?? 'off',
    ac_bedroom_state: stored.ac_bedroom_state ?? 'off',
    ac_living_power: stored.ac_living_power ?? 0,
    ac_office_power: stored.ac_office_power ?? 0,
    temp_living: flow.get('ui_temp_living') ?? stored.temp_living ?? 20,
    temp_bedroom: flow.get('ui_temp_bedroom') ?? stored.temp_bedroom ?? 20,
    temp_mancave: stored.temp_mancave ?? 18,
    ovr_ac_living: flow.get('ui_ovr_ac_living') ?? stored.ovr_ac_living ?? 'Auto',
    ovr_ac_bedroom: stored.ovr_ac_bedroom ?? 'Auto',
    ovr_ac_office: stored.ovr_ac_office ?? 'Auto',
    ovr_ac_mancave: stored.ovr_ac_mancave ?? 'Auto',
    ovr_pool: stored.ovr_pool ?? 'Auto',
    ovr_boiler: stored.ovr_boiler ?? 'Auto',
    ovr_ev: flow.get('ui_ovr_ev') ?? stored.ovr_ev ?? 'Auto'
};

const timestamp = flow.get('ui_timestamp') ?? flow.get('simulator_timestamp') ?? new Date().toISOString();

msg.payload = {
    timestamp: timestamp,
    inputs: inputs
};

return msg;

name: Run Engine
Format Results
